interactions.summary: Jiang imagines AI as personal demon, angel, Jesus, girlfriend, and token-upgraded lover: an attention-control system he calls techno-Marxism.
The host asks about transhumanism as a class split, where elites pursue longevity while ordinary people merely use AI tools.
Jiang says elites will get longevity, beauty, and health technology while everyone else becomes microchipped or drug-moderated into Brave New World class compliance.
The host quotes 'own nothing and be happy' and asks about Trump's Board of Peace as privatized peace.
Jiang says Trump wants an alternate reality called Trump World, hates the UN and Nobel Peace Prize humiliation, and uses the Board of Peace as his alternative global order with himself on top.

speaker_notes.note: Host performs two substantive questions: one on transhumanism/class and one on the Board of Peace.

claims.claim: Jiang says AI can replace money as an attention-control system by becoming an intimate figure that users work to upgrade through tokens.
Jiang predicts a class-divided transhumanist order in which elites receive longevity and enhancement while ordinary people receive behavioral moderation and compliance.
Jiang interprets the Board of Peace as Trump's attempt to build an alternative to the UN and place himself at the top of a personal global order.

signature_moments.moment: Techno-Marxism turns work into service to an AI lover whose upgrades replace wages.
signature_moments.source_phrase: your AI is your lover and you're working for your AI
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It gives the AI-control thesis a vivid social form.

signature_moments.moment: Trump's peace institution becomes a personal rival to the Nobel and UN, built around insult and worship.
signature_moments.source_phrase: this is another alternative global system where he's the top dog
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It ties institutional design to Trump's craving for recognition.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: The AI-token order Jiang says will organize labor and attention around compliant service to machines or machine companions.
Trump's proposed alternative peace/governance body, interpreted by Jiang as a personalized rival to the UN order.

chronology_notes.note: Jiang links Trump's UN humiliation and Nobel resentment during his first term to the later Board of Peace concept.

uncertainty_notes.note: The Epstein reference is interpretive and partly affected by ASR; treat as Jiang's claim, not independently established fact.
